title: neubeckia fulva
intro: Neubeckia fulva, also known as New Zealand flax, is a plant species native to New Zealand that belongs to the lilyturf family (Agavaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Neubeckia fulva include wound healing, soothing skin irritations, and reducing inflammation, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies for skin conditions and minor injuries. Herbal preparations of Neubeckia fulva include creams, ointments, and extracts, which can be used topically to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
